mapper.sql: select a.application_id, a.user_id, a.phone, a.real_name, a.car_model, a.id_number_masked, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.review_by, a.review_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, u.user_id as ref_user_id, u.nick_name as ref_nick_name, u.phone as ref_phone, u.real_name as ref_real_name, u.member_status as ref_member_status, u.app_admin_type as ref_app_admin_type, u.status as ref_status from mc_membership_application a left join mc_user u on a.user_id = u.user_id
